title: . Ocular inspection. The Chairman, any Commissioner, Labor Arbiter or their duly authorized
content:
. Ocular inspection. The Chairman, any Commissioner, Labor Arbiter or their duly authorized 
representatives, may, at any time during working hours, conduct an ocular inspection on any establishment, 
building, ship or vessel, place or premises, including any work, material, implement, machinery, appliance or 
any object therein, and ask any employee, laborer, or any person, as the case may be, for any information or 
data concerning any matter or question relative to the object of the investigation.
